description: A technician checks the quality of natural gas being received from a supplier to ensure it meets the utility's tariff specifications.

nodes.task_description: Use a portable gas chromatograph to take a sample of the gas.

expected_outcome.expected: Technician successfully obtains a gas sample.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the sample to determine its composition and heating value (BTU content).

expected_outcome.expected: The analysis provides the exact composition of the gas.

nodes.task_description: Compare the results to the specifications in the gas tariff.

expected_outcome.expected: Technician confirms the gas quality is within the acceptable range.

nodes.task_description: Log the results in the gas management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Technician successfully logs the quality test results.
